summary: Completed frontend testing of cinematic visual enhancements. Dashboard loads successfully with all 3 overlay layers, panel materials, and visual effects working. Minor issues with WebGL canvas detection and AI Core modal functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: WebGL canvas element not detectable via data-testid='visual-engine' selector, though WebGL is running

integration_issues.issue: T element click doesn't open modal/overlay - AI Core content is visible but not in modal format

console_warnings.issue: React hydration mismatch for DndDescribedBy attributes
GPU stall due to ReadPixels and unsupported GSUB table warnings

passed_tests: Dashboard loads at /dashboard with all content intact
3 overlay layers present: lighting-overlay, core-wash, atmosphere-haze
Dashboard layout unchanged: top-bar, left-column, ai-core-placeholder, right-column
All content sections present: attention (3), projects (3), trades, schedule, tasks, stats
Login page loads with functional form elements
Onboarding page loads with Get Started button
CSS variables loaded correctly with expected values
All buttons clickable (7/7 buttons tested successfully)
Visual enhancements working: vignette, bloom, atmosphere haze
Cinematic integration successful between WebGL and UI
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Fix AI Core modal to open properly on T click. WebGL canvas detection selector may need adjustment. Console warnings are non-critical but could be cleaned up.
